keys.restored: Isipele sokhiye sibuyisiwe ✓ Okhiye bafakwe endaweni
keys.noBackup: Akukho sipele esifihliwe esikhona kule akhawunti

keySetup.title: Hlela okhiye bakho bedivayisi
keySetup.description: Le divayisi ayikabi nakho ukhiye wakho wangasese. Ngenisa isipele esivikelwe ngephasiwedi, noma wenze ipheya entsha yokhiye (uzokwazi ukufunda imiyalezo emisha kusukela manje).
keySetup.imported: Ukhiye wangasese ungenisiwe kule divayisi. Ungafunda imiyalezo endala manje.
keySetup.enterPassword: Faka iphasiwedi ye-akhawunti yakho ukuze sikwazi ukugcina okhiye bakho ngokuphepha.

auth.headline: Ukuthumela imiyalezo evikelekile kunoma ngubani, noma kuphi
auth.description: Ukufihla ukuphela ukuphela, ukuhumusha ezilimini ezingaphezu kuka-100, imiyalezo enyamalala, nokushaya ucingo/ividiyo.

feature.privacy: Okubekwa kuqala ubumfihlo. Idatha yakho, ukulawula kwakho.

hero.line1: Ukuthumela imiyalezo evikelekile kunoma ngubani, noma kuphi — nge
hero.sub: Thola inombolo yocingo evikelekile yamahhala ukuze ushayele futhi uthumele imiyalezo emhlabeni wonke nge-Wi-Fi noma idatha. Jabulela ukufihla ukuphela ukuphela, imiyalezo enyamalala, nokushaya ucingo/ividiyo ye-HD — namathuluzi akhelwe ngaphakathi asiza ukuhlala uxhumene ngaphesheya kwemingcele.
hero.freeNote: Ukushaya ucingo nokuthumela imiyalezo okuyisisekelo kumahhala. Izici ze-AI ezithuthukile nezici ze-premium zidinga ukuthuthukiswa.

feat.privacy: Okubekwa kuqala ubumfihlo. Idatha yakho, ukulawula kwakho.

auth.desktopTip: Kudeskithophu? Skena ngefoni yakho ukuze uthole uhlelo lokusebenza.
auth.scanHelper: Kudeskithophu? Skena ngefoni yakho ukuze uthole uhlelo lokusebenza.
auth.subhead: Ukuthumela imiyalezo eyimfihlo, efihliwe, nehunyushiwe — ngokushesha.
auth.tip: Ithiphu: Sebenzisa i-akhawunti efanayo kuwebhu naku-mobile. Imiyalezo yakho ihlala ivumelaniswe.
auth.scanHint: Skena ukuze ulayishe uhlelo lokusebenza noma uvule kusiphequluli sakho.

registration.passwordDescription: Okungenani izinhlamvu ezi-6. Sebenzisa iphasiwedi eqinile, eyingqayizivele.
registration.smsConsent: Ngokwakha i-akhawunti, uyavuma ukuthola izaziso ze-SMS ezihlobene nomsebenzi wakho we-Chatforia (njengemiyalezo evela kwabanye abasebenzisi). Amazinga omyalezo nedatha angase asebenze. Ungakhetha ukuphuma noma nini ku-Settings.

auth.enterValidRecipient: Faka igama lomuntu oxhumene olondoloziwe noma inombolo yocingo.
auth.sendFailed: Ukuthumela kwehlulekile. Hlola ikhonsoli ukuze uthole imininingwane.

chat.selectPrompt: Khetha umbhalo noma igumbi lengxoxo ukuze uqale ukuxoxa
chat.unlockToView: Vula ukhiye wakho ukuze ubuke lo myyalezo

messageInput.freeLimit: Umkhawulo weplan yamahhala: ukususa ngokuzenzakalelayo kuze kube usuku olu-1. Kufinyelelwe ku-1d.
messageInput.premiumLimit: Okuphezulu kokususa ngokuzenzakalelayo kwe-Premium yizinsuku ezingama-30. Kufinyelelwe ku-30d.
messageInput.nothingToSend: Thayipha umyalezo noma namathisela ifayela ukuze uthumele.
messageInput.caption: Umbhalo (okungenzeka)

errors.attachmentTooLarge: Okunamathiselwe kukhulu kakhulu. Zama ifayela elincane.
errors.rateLimit: Uthumela imiyalezo ngokushesha kakhulu. Sicela wehlise isivinini.
errors.validation: Iphutha lokuqinisekisa. Sicela uhlole umyalezo wakho futhi uzame futhi.
errors.failedToSend: Ukuthumela kwehlulekile. Ungazama futhi ibhola elwehlulekile.

contactList.couldNotStart: Ayikwazanga ukuqala ingxoxo. Sicela uzame futhi.
contactList.startFailed: Ukugalulwa kwengxoxo kwehlulekile. Sicela uzame futhi.
contactList.deleteFailed: Ukususa oxhumene kwehlulekile. Sicela uzame futhi.
contactList.updateAliasFailed: Ukubuyekeza i-alias kwehlulekile. Sicela uzame futhi.
contactList.loadFailed: Ukulayisha oxhumene kwehlulekile. Sicela uzame futhi.
contactList.callStarted: Ushayela le nombolo ngenombolo yakho ye-Chatforia…
contactList.callFailed: Ukugalulwa kocingo kwehlulekile. Sicela uzame futhi.

startChatModal.title: Qala ingxoxo
startChatModal.searchPlaceholder: Sesha igama, igama lomsebenzisi, noma inombolo yocingo

addContactModal.title: Engeza oxhumene
addContactModal.enterPhoneOrUsername: Faka inombolo yocingo noma igama lomsebenzisi.

status.filesNote: Kuze kube amafayela angu-5. Ukuphelelwa yisikhathi kwe-24h ngokuzenzakalelayo.

profile.title: Iphrofayili Yomsebenzisi
profile.mustLogin: Kufanele ungene ngemvume ukuze ubone izilungiselelo.
profile.noPrivateKey: Akukho khiye wangasese kule divayisi ukuthumela.
profile.setBackupPassword: Setha iphasiwedi ukuze ufihle isipele sakho:
profile.importFailed: Ukungenisa ukhiye kwehlulekile (iphasiwedi engalungile noma ifayela elonakele).
profile.keysRotated: Ipheya entsha yokhiye yakhiwe futhi ukhiye womphakathi wathunyelwa.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Ukhiye wakho wangasese awushiyi kule divayisi. Thumela ikhophi evikelwe ngephasiwedi ukuze uyibuyise kwenye idivayisi.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Use ku-Free—sebenzisa izinketho ezisheshayo ze-Sun/Moon ngezansi. Thuthukisa ukuze uvule izihloko eziningi.
profile.backupDesc: Gcina ukhiye wakho wokufihla ukuze ubuyise ngokuphepha imiyalezo yakho kwenye idivayisi.
profile.freePlanCopy: Use kuplan yamahhala. Thuthukisa ukuze uvule izici eziningi njengezipele, izinombolo ezengeziwe, nezinketho zokuphepha ezithuthukile.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Ayikwazanga ukuvula iphothali yokubhadala. Sicela uzame futhi.
profile.followHint: Izindaba zabo zizovela ekudleni kwakho kokulandelayo uma bethumela ngezilaleli Abalandeli (noma Umlomunye).
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Dlulisa izingcingo nemiyalezo ezingenayo kunombolo yocingo noma i-imeyili yakho eqinisekisiwe. Izingcingo/imiyalezo ephumayo ingabonisa inombolo yakho ye-Chatforia.
profile.errSmsDest: Khetha okungenani indawo eyodwa (ifoni noma i-imeyili).
profile.errQuietHours: Amahora okuthula kufanele abe phakathi kuka-0 no-23.
profile.ageBandHint: Sigcina kuphela ibhendi yeminyaka (hhayi usuku lwakho lokuzalwa oluqondile). Lokhu kusetshenziselwa ukugcina ukubhanqa kwe-Random Chat kunengqondo.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Sebenzisa ukubhanqa okusekelwe eminyakeni ku-Random Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Uma ivuliwe, sizama ukukubhanqa nabantu abasemabandeni eminyaka ehambisanayo.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Abasakhulayo bahlala bebhanqwa kuphela nabanye abasakhulayo. Abadala abakwazi ukubhanqwa nabasakhulayo.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Ngokuphepha, ama-akhawunti asemabandeni eminyaka engu-13–17 angabhanqwa kuphela namanye ama-akhawunti angu-13–17 ku-Random Chat.
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Uma lokhu kuvuliwe, i-Foria ingasebenzisa izingxoxo zakho zakamuva ze-Random Chat (kuphela nawe) ukuze igcine ingxoxo ihamba. Ungayivala noma nini.
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Shiya kungenalutho ukuze ugcine kuze kube phakade
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Isetshenziswa lapho ukubingelela kwakho komsindo kungatholakali.
profile.voicemailNote: Ama-voicemail avela ezinombolweni zakho ze-Chatforia agcinwa kwi-inbox yakho ye-Voicemail. Unganika amandla ukubhalwa nokudlulisa kuma-plan asekelwayo.
profile.portHint: Ufuna ukugcina inombolo yakho yamanje? Ungayifaka ku-Chatforia Wireless.

esim.title: I-eSIM ye-Chatforia
esim.desc: Thola idatha yeselula ye-Chatforia lapho ukude ne-Wi-Fi.

wireless.title: I-Chatforia Wireless
wireless.description: Phatha iplan yakho ye-Chatforia yeselula, izinombolo, ukudlulisa, nokufaka inombolo.

options.heading: Khetha ukuthi ufuna ukusebenzisa kanjani i-Chatforia
options.subheading: Ungathola inombolo entsha ye-Chatforia, noma ulethe inombolo yakho ekhona evela kwenye inkampani.
options.portNumber: Faka inombolo yakho yamanje ku-Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: Faka inombolo yakho ekhona
port.subheading: Hambisa inombolo yakho yocingo yamanje evela kwinkampani yakho yamanje iye ku-Chatforia. Qiniseka ukuthi imininingwane ifana ncamashi ne-akhawunti yakho yenkampani ukuze ugweme ukubambezeleka.

status.heading: Isimo sokufaka
status.subheading: Landelela isimo sezicelo zakho zokufaka inombolo.

wireless.exhausted: Idatha yakho iphelile. Thenga ipakethe elisha ukuze uqhubeke usebenzisa idatha yeselula.

error.invite: Ayikwazanga ukudala isimemo. Qiniseka ukuthi ungumnikazi womndeni futhi uzame futhi.
error.checkout: Asikwazanga ukuqala ukukhokha kweplan yomndeni. Sicela uzame futhi.

billing.freePlanCopy: Use kuplan yamahhala. Thuthukisa ukuze uvule izici eziningi.
billing.cancelNowHelp: Ungaphatha noma ukhansela ukubhalisa kwakho kwephothali yokubhadala, noma ukhansela ngokushesha ngezansi.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukukhansela iplan yakho ngokushesha? Lokhu ngeke kuphinde kwenzeke.
billing.cancelNowError: Ayikwazanga ukukhansela iplan yakho okwamanje. Sicela uzame futhi noma usebenzise Phatha ukubhadala.

none.title: Akukho mndeni osethelwe okwamanje
none.body: Ukuze udale Umndeni we-Chatforia kanye nephuli yedatha eyabiwe, qala iplan yomndeni.

data.heading: Iphuli yedatha eyabiwe
data.caption: Onke amalungu abelana ngale phuli. Sizokuxwayisa njengoba usondela kumkhawulo wakho.

invite.title: Mema ilungu elisha
invite.body: Thumela i-imeyili noma isixhumanisi ukuze umeme othile kwiphuli yedatha yomndeni wakho eyabiwe.
invite.expiryHint: Lesixhumanisi siphelelwa yisikhathi emva kwezinsuku ezimbalwa. Ungahlala udala esinye esisha.

join.title: Joyina umndeni
join.body: Umemwe ukujoyina Umndeni we-Chatforia futhi wabelane ngephuli yedatha yabo.
join.success: Ujoyine lo mndeni. Manje wabelana ngephuli yedatha yabo.
join.error: Asikwazanga ukugeza wena kulo mndeni. Isimemo singase singavumeleki noma siphelelwe yisikhathi.

premium.heading: Iya ku-Premium
premium.description: Vula izici zamandla futhi ususe izikhangiso.

upgrade.title: Thuthukisa
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Qala ngeplan yamahhala esekelwe izikhangiso. Yiba mahhala nge-Plus, noma vula izici zamandla aphelele nge-Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Khetha iplan yohlelo lokusebenza, engeza amapakethe edatha kuwe, noma wabelane ngedatha nomndeni wakho — konke kusendaweni eyodwa.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Qala ngeplan yamahhala esekelwe izikhangiso. Yiba mahhala nge-Plus, noma vula izici zamandla aphelele nge-Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Engeza idatha ye-eSIM yomhlaba wonke ukuze i-Chatforia iqhubeke isebenza ngisho nalapho ukude ne-Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Yakha iphuli yedatha eyabiwe yomndeni wakho futhi uphathe ukusetshenziswa kwawo wonke umuntu endaweni eyodwa.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Vula izici zamandla futhi ususe izikhangiso.

free.title: Mahhala
free.desc: Qala ukuthumela imiyalezo mahhala. Kuhle uma uzama nje i-Chatforia.

features.chat: Ingxoxo yangempela 1:1 namagumbi, kanye nokushaya ucingo nevidiyo
features.media: Yabelana ngezithombe, imiyalezo yomsindo, namavidiyo amafushane
features.ai: Izimpendulo ezihlakaniphile eziqhutshwa yi-AI nokuhumusha okusheshayo (ukusetshenziswa okufanele)
features.ads: Mahhala kuze kube phakade ngezikhangiso ohlelweni lokusebenza

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Konke okuyisisekelo, ngaphandle kwezikhangiso. Kuhle ukuthumela imiyalezo nokushaya ucingo kwansuku zonke.

features.forwarding: Dlulisa izingcingo nemiyalezo kunombolo yakho yocingo yangempela
features.history: Umlando womyalezo omude (kuze kube izinyanga ezi-6)

plus.ctaPublic: Thola i-Plus — qhubeka ukuya ekungeneni ngemvume

premiumMonthly.title: I-Premium (Ngenyanga)
premiumMonthly.desc: Okuhlangenwe nakho okuphelele kwe-Chatforia: amathuluzi amandla e-AI, ukwezela, nokusekela okubalulekile.

features.themes: Vula zonke izihloko zemibala ze-premium nokwezela kohlelo lokusebenza
features.ai: Amathuluzi amandla e-AI kuphela kwe-Premium okubhalwa kabusha, izimpendulo ezihlakaniphile, nezinhlukaniso
features.support: Usizo olubalulekile lapho udinga usizo kakhulu

premiumMonthly.ctaPublic: Vula i-Premium — qhubeka ukuya ekungeneni ngemvume

premiumAnnual.title: I-Premium (Yonyaka)
premiumAnnual.desc: Gcina kakhulu uma ukhokhwa ngonyaka — kuhlanganise izihloko zemibala ezengeziwe, amathuluzi e-AI, nokusekela okubalulekile.

features.allPremium: Konke okuku-Premium Ngenyanga — kuhlanganise izihloko zemibala ezengeziwe
features.save25: Gcina cishe ama-30% uma uqhathaniswa nokukhokha ngenyanga
features.bestFor: Kuhle kakhulu kubasebenzisi abanamandla, abasebenzi abakude, nabahambi abasindayo

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: Gcina ama-30% ngonyaka — qhubeka ukuya ekungeneni ngemvume
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Ikhokhwa ngaphambili. Khansela noma nini. Akukho zinkokhelo ezifihliwe.

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Izici ezigcwele, amaringithoni, namathuluzi amandla e-AI.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Ikhokhwa ngaphambili. Khansela noma nini. Akukho zinkokhelo ezifihliwe.

mobile.title: I-Chatforia Mobile (amapakethe edatha ye-eSIM)
mobile.subtitle: Engeza idatha yomhlaba wonke ukuze i-Chatforia iqhubeke isebenza ngisho nalapho ungekho ku-Wi-Fi. Amanani alungiswa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngokwezwe lakho nemali.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Khetha ipakethe yedatha yomhlaba wonke yesikhathi esisodwa ukuze i-Chatforia iqhubeke isebenza lapho uhamba noma ukude ne-Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Asithengisi amapakethe edatha angaphansi kwe-3 GB.

features.throttle: Izinga lesivinini lingase lehle emva kokusetshenziswa okuphezulu

disclaimer.devices: Amapakethe edatha ye-eSIM adinga idivayisi esekelwe i-eSIM futhi evuliwe. Ukutholakala kuyahlukahluka ngomodeli yefoni, inkampani, nezwe. Ukumbozwa namazinga esivinini kuyahlukahluka ngendawo.

small.title: Ipakethe yokuqala
small.desc: Ihlanganisa i-3 GB yedatha enesivinini esiphezulu — kuhle ukuthumela imiyalezo elula nokushaya ucingo ngezikhathi ezithile.
small.bestFor: Uhambo olufushane, ukuthumela imiyalezo elula, nokushaya ucingo ngezikhathi ezithile

medium.title: Ipakethe yomhambi
medium.desc: Ihlanganisa i-5 GB yedatha enesivinini esiphezulu yohambo, ukuya nokubuya, nokushaya ucingo kwe-VoIP njalo.
medium.bestFor: Amasonto ohambo, ukushaya ucingo kwe-VoIP njalo, namamephu

large.title: Ipakethe yamandla
large.desc: Ihlanganisa i-10 GB yedatha enesivinini esiphezulu yokuxoxa okusindayo, izingcingo, nevidiyo kunethiwekhi ye-Chatforia.
large.bestFor: Ukuxoxa okusindayo, izingcingo, ividiyo, nokusebenzisa i-hotspot
large.aria: Thenga ipakethe yedatha ye-eSIM yomsebenzisi wamandla

compare.title: Qhathanisa amapakethe edatha ye-eSIM
compare.disclaimer: Ukusetshenziswa kwedatha kwangempela kuncike ekutheni usebenzisa kanjani i-Chatforia (ukushaya ucingo, ividiyo, imidiya, nezinye izinhlelo zefoni yakho).

family.title: Umndeni we-Chatforia (idatha eyabiwe)
family.subtitle: Yabelana ngephuli yedatha eyodwa emndenini wakho. I-bill eyodwa, ama-akhawunti amaningi e-Chatforia, ukumbozwa komhlaba wonke.

small.title: Umndeni Omncane
small.desc: Ihlanganisa i-20 GB yedatha enesivinini esiphezulu eyabiwe — kuhle kubasebenzisi abangu-2–3 abalula.

medium.title: Umndeni Omaphakathi
medium.desc: Ihlanganisa i-40 GB yedatha enesivinini esiphezulu eyabiwe — kuhle kumalungu angu-3–5 asebenzayo.

large.title: Umndeni Omkhulu
large.desc: Ihlanganisa i-80 GB yedatha enesivinini esiphezulu eyabiwe — kumindeneni enamandla ehlala iku-inthanethi.

feature.fairUse: Ngaphansi kwenqubomgomo yokusetshenziswa okufanele nemikhawulo yendawo

family.disclaimer: Amapakethe omndeni akha noma engeza iphuli yedatha eyabiwe. Ungamema futhi ususe amalungu noma nini.
family.footnote: Amapakethe omndeni abelana ngephuli yedatha eyodwa kuwo wonke ama-akhawunti e-Chatforia axhunyiwe. Ukutholakala nemikhawulo kuncike ezweni lakho nemithetho yendawo.

why.title: Kungani abantu beshintshela ku-Chatforia
why.subtitle: I-Chatforia ikunikeza inombolo yocingo yangempela, ukuhumusha okhaliphile, nendlela ecacile yokuba mahhala ngezikhangiso lapho usukulungele.

textnow.title: I-Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Izikhangiso ezilula ku-Free, ukuthuthukiswa okulula kwe-Plus lapho usukulungele, namathuluzi e-Premium u-TextNow angawanikezi.

voice.title: I-Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Uhlelo lokusebenza lwesimanje, idizayini yomhlaba wonke kuqala, nokuhumusha okwakhelwe ngaphakathi esikhundleni sokudlulisa ucingo kwesikolo esidala.

messengers.title: I-Chatforia vs izinhlelo zokuthumela imiyalezo
messengers.body: Thumela izinombolo zocingo zangempela — hhayi nje abanye abasebenzisi bohlelo — nge-AI nesimo esakhelwe ngaphakathi. Kuhle uma uvela ezinhlelweni ezifana ne-TextFree noma i-TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Ukuqhathanisa kususelwa olwazini olutholakala emphakathini futhi lungase lushintshe ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. Ezinye izinhlelo zokuthumela imiyalezo yamahhala ezifana ne-TextFree noma i-TextMe ngokuvamile ziyafana ne-TextNow.

free.a: Yebo. Iplan yamahhala ihlanganisa inombolo ye-Chatforia, ukushaya ucingo, nokuthumela imiyalezo ngezikhangiso. Ungahlala ku-Free isikhathi eside ngendlela othanda ngayo, noma thuthukise ukuze ususe izikhangiso futhi uvule izici eziningi.

plusPremium.a: I-Plus isusa izikhangiso futhi inweba umlando womyalezo wakho — iphelele ukusetshenziswa kwansuku zonke. I-Premium engeza ukwezela okwengeziwe, amathuluzi e-AI okubhalwa kabusha nezimpendulo, nokusekela okubalulekile kubasebenzisi abasindayo.

esim.a: I-Chatforia Mobile isebenzisa ukumbozwa kwe-eSIM yomhlaba wonke. Ukutholakala kuncike ezweni lakho nedivayisi. Uzobona izinketho ezisekelwayo ngesikhathi sokusebenza ngaphakathi kohlelo lokusebenza.

cancel.q: Ngingakhansela noma shintsha izinhlelo noma nini?
cancel.a: Yebo. Ungaphatha noma ukhansela ukubhalisa kwakho ekhasini lokubhadala ohlelweni lokusebenza. Izinguquko zisebenza ekupheleni kwesikhathi sakho sokubhadala samanje.

family.a: Amapakethe omndeni akha iphuli yedatha eyabiwe kuwo wonke ama-akhawunti e-Chatforia amaningi. Umuntu oyedwa ukhokha i-bill, futhi ungamema noma ususe amalungu futhi usethe imikhawulo ngomuntu ngamunye.

gettingStarted.title: Ukuqala
gettingStarted.subtitle: Uqala ku-Chatforia? Lesi siqondiso esisheshayo sibonisa izinto eziyisisekelo ukuze ukwazi ukusebenza ngeminithi ezimbalwa.

alert.text: Lesisiqondiso sizokhula njengoba sethula izici ezintsha. Uma kukhona okushodayo, sazise nge

section2.title: 2) Qala ukuthumela imiyalezo
section2.item1: Yakha i-DM noma i-Group futhi uthumele umyalezo wakho wokuqala.
section2.item2: Sebenzisa ukuhumusha okusheshayo ukuze uxoxe ezilimini ezingaphezu kuka-100.
section2.item3: Zama imiyalezo enyamalala nokwamukela ukufundwa ku-Profile → Ubumfihlo.

section3.title: 3) Qhubeka kakhulu
section3.item1: Ungathuthukisa kuplan ekhokhwayo noma nini ngaphakathi kohlelo lokusebenza.
section3.item2: Uma usungenile ngemvume, ungaxhuma amadivayisi engeziwe futhi usethe izipele ezifihliwe ezivela ku-Settings ohlelweni lokusebenza.

account.q: Ngenza kanjani noma ngibuyise i-akhawunti yami?
account.a: Landa uhlelo lokusebenza noma usebenzise iwebhu, thepha “Yakha i-akhawunti”, qinisekisa i-imeyili/ifoni yakho. Ukuze ubuyise, sebenzisa “Ukhohlwe iphasiwedi”.

privacy.a: Yebo. Imiyalezo nezingcingo zifihlwe ukuphela ukuphela ngokuzenzakalelayo. Wena nomamukeli kuphela ongazifunda.

translate.a: Nika amandla “Humusha ngokuzenzakalelayo” ku-Settings → Ukubukeka & Ulimi. Sihumusha edivayisini lapho kusekelwe khona, ngaphandle kwalokho ngama-API avikelekile anemininingwane encane.

contact.a: Sifinyelele ku-support@chatforia.com. Hlanganisa izithombe-skrini nenguqulo yohlelo lokusebenza lakho.

contact.title: Xhumana Nathi
contact.errorSend: Ayikwazanga ukuthumela. Sicela uthumele i-imeyili ku-support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: Le Nqubomgomo Yobumfihlo ichaza ukuthi i-Chatforia (“thina”, “us”) iqoqa, isebenzise, futhi yabelane ngolwazi kanjani lapho usebenzisa izinhlelo zethu namasevisi. Sakhela i-Chatforia ukuze inciphise idatha esingayifinyelela.

infoWeCollect.title: Ulwazi esiliqoqayo
infoWeCollect.account: Ulwazi lwe-akhawunti (isib., i-imeyili/ifoni) ukuze udale futhi uvikele i-akhawunti yakho.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Okuqukethwe okufihliwe (imiyalezo/izingcingo) kufihlwe ukuphela ukuphela; asikwazi ukukufunda.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Ukuxilonga/ukusetshenziswa njengezikhonjwa zokuphahlazeka, uhlobo lwedivayisi, noma izibalo eziyisisekelo ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukusebenza.

sms.title: Izinombolo zocingo ezihambayo ne-SMS
sms.body: Uma ukhetha ukunikeza inombolo yocingo ephathekayo, siyisebenzisa ukuze sinike amandla izici ezifana nokuqinisekisa i-akhawunti, izaziso zokungena ngemvume, nokuthumela imiyalezo yomsebenzisi kuya komunye umsebenzisi nge-SMS lapho kusekelwe khona. Singase sithumele imiyalezo ye-SMS ephathelene nokusebenza kwakho nokusebenza ku-Chatforia. Ungakhetha ukuphuma ekutholeni imiyalezo ye-SMS noma nini ngokuphendula ngegama elivumelekile lokuphuma (njenge-“STOP”) noma ngokushintsha okuthandayo kwezaziso zakho ohlelweni lokusebenza. Asithengisi inombolo yakho yocingo noma siyisebenzise ukumaketha okungahlangene.

howWeUse.title: Sisebenzisa kanjani ulwazi
howWeUse.provide: Nikeza futhi uvikele isevisi (ukuqinisekisa, ukuthola ugaxekile/ukuhlukumeza).

sharing.title: Ukwabelana
sharing.body: Asithengisi idatha yomuntu siqu. Singase sabelane ngedatha elinganiselwe nabaphathi (isib., izaziso zokuphusha, izibalo) ngaphansi kwezinkontileka eziqinile.

rights.title: Amalungelo akho
rights.body: Ngokuya ngesifunda sakho (isib., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), ungase ucele ukufinyelela, ukulungisa, ukususa, noma ukuphuma ekucubunguleni okuthile. Xhumana: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Ukugcinwa kwedatha nokuphepha
retention.body: Sigcina kuphela lokho okudingekayo ukuze sisebenzise isevisi futhi sisebenzise ukuphepha okujwayelekile kwezimboni. Okuqukethwe kwe-E2E ngeke kukhishiwe yithi.

children.title: Izingane
children.body: I-Chatforia ayiqondiswe ezinganeni ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-13 (noma njengoba kudingeka ngumthetho wakho wendawo).

changes.title: Izinguquko
changes.body: Sizothumela izibuyekezo lapha futhi sibuyekeze idethi “Ibuyekezwe ekugcineni”.

contact.title: Xhumana
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: Ngokusebenzisa i-Chatforia uyavuma kule Migomo. Uma ungavumi, ungasebenzisi isevisi.

accounts.title: Ama-akhawunti
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Nikeza ulwazi olunembile futhi ugcine iziqinisekiso zakho zivikelekile.

acceptableUse.title: Ukusetshenziswa okwamukelekayo
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Akukho okuqukethwe okungekho emthethweni, okunokuhlukumeza, noma okuphulayo; akukho ugaxekile noma ukuhlukumeza okuzenzakalelayo.

sms.title: Ukuxhumana nge-SMS
sms.body: Uma unikeza inombolo yocingo ephathekayo, uyavuma ukuthi i-Chatforia ingase ikuthumele imiyalezo ye-SMS ehlobene ne-akhawunti yakho nokusebenzisa isevisi, njengezaziso zokungena ngemvume, izaziso zokuphepha, nemiyalezo ehlobene nezingxoxo oziqalayo noma ozihlanganyelayo. Asisebenzisi i-SMS ukumaketha noma ukuthengisa ngaphandle kwemvume yakho ecacile. Amazinga omyalezo nedatha angase asebenze. Ungakhetha ukuphuma ezimiyalezweni ze-SMS noma nini ngokuphendula ngegama elivumelekile lokuphuma (isib., “STOP”) noma ngokubuyekeza izilungiselelo zezaziso zakho ohlelweni lokusebenza.

yourContent.title: Okuqukethwe kwakho
yourContent.body: Ugcina amalungelo okuqukethwe kwakho. Usinikeza amalungelo adingekayo ukuze sisebenzise isevisi (isib., ukudlulisela, ukugcina, ukuhumusha).

disclaimer.title: Izexwayiso nokubhekana nesibopho
disclaimer.body: Isevisi inikezwa “njengoba injalo” ngaphandle kweziqinisekiso. Ngokwezinga eliphelele elivunyelwe ngumthetho, i-Chatforia ayinabhekana nesibopho sokulimala okungaqondile noma okulandelanayo.

changes.title: Izinguquko
changes.body: Singase sibuyekeze le migomo; ukuqhubeka nokusebenzisa emva kwezinguquko kusho ukwamukela.

contact.title: Xhumana
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Ungathengisi noma Wabelane Ngolwazi Lwami Lomuntu Siqu
doNotSell.body: I-Chatforia ayithengisi ulwazi lomuntu siqu. Izakhamizi zaseCalifornia zingase zithumele izicelo ngaphansi kwe-CPRA usebenzisa inkinobho engezansi.

cookies.title: Izilungiselelo zekhukhi
cookies.body: I-Chatforia isebenzisa amakhukhi amancane (isib., isikhathi, ukuphepha). Asisebenzisi amakhukhi ezikhangiso zenkampani yesithathu. Phatha amakhukhi ngokusebenzisa izilungiselelo zesiphequluli sakho.

phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Akukho nombolo eyabelwe. Khetha eyodwa ngekhodi yendawo ukuze uqale ukuthumela imiyalezo.

startChatModal.title: Qala ingxoxo
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Thayipha igama, igama lomsebenzisi, ifoni, noma i-imeyili…
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Thayipha igama lomsebenzisi noma ifoni bese ucindezela Sesha.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Okufakwe ifoni/i-imeyili kuzotholakala emva kokuthi uziwisele njengoxhumene.

sounds.freeNotice: Use ku-Free — amathoni e-premium abonisiwe kodwa akhiyiwe. Thuthukisa ukuze uvule konke.

aiSettings.title: Izilungiselelo ze-AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: Lawula ukuhumusha, izimpendulo ezihlakaniphile, nezimpendulo ezizenzakalelayo ze-ForiaBot.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Thumela imiyalezo embalwa etholiwe yokugcina (ehlanziwe) ku-AI ukuze iphakamise izimpendulo ezisheshayo.
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: Uma ivuliwe, iziphakamiso ezibuyiswa yi-AI zizoba namagama aphawuliwe afihliwe
aiSettings.enableAutoReply: Nika amandla ukuphendula ngokuzenzakalelayo lapho ngimatasa

accessibilitySettings.title: Ukufinyeleleka & Izaziso
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Izinketho zokwenza i-Chatforia ibe lula ukuyisebenzisa ngaphandle kokuthembela emsindweni.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Iqala ngosayizi ovamile. Khulisa uma uthanda umbhalo omkhulu ezilungiselelweni zokufinyeleleka.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Izaziso ezibonakalayo zemiyalezo nezingcingo
Bonisa amabhena nokucwayita kwesihloko ukuze ungaphuthelwa umsebenzi.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate emiyalezweni emisha (lapho kusekelwe khona)
Qala ukudlidliza kwedivayisi ngezaziso.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Khanyisa isikrini ezingcingweni ezingenayo
Ukukhanya okufushane okukhanyayo lapho ucingo lukhala.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Bonisa amabhena nokucwayita kwesihloko ukuze ungaphuthelwa umsebenzi.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Ukukhanya okufushane okukhanyayo lapho ucingo lukhala.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Gcina kuphela i-ciphertext kuseva. Kuyavalwa i-AI/Ukuhumusha nokubuka kuqala kokuphatha.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Sesha nge-alias, igama, igama lomsebenzisi, noma ifoni
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Yabelana ngesixhumanisi sakho sesimemo ukuze uqale ukuxoxa ngokushesha.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Hlala uxhumene usohambweni nge-Chatforia ye-iOS ne-Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Ithiphu: Imiyalezo yakho ihlala ivumelaniswe kuwebhu naku-mobile.

randomChat.title: Ingxoxo Engahleliwe
randomChat.description: Hlangana nomuntu omusha ngokushesha. Sizokubhanqa futhi sivule igumbi lengxoxo lesikhashana. Xoxa ngokungaziwa kuqala. Engeza Umngane kamuva uma kuzwakala kulungile.
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: Sigcina kuphela ibhendi yeminyaka (hhayi usuku lwakho lokuzalwa oluqondile). Lokhu kusetshenziselwa ukugcina ukubhanqa kwe-Random Chat kunengqondo. Ukuze ubhanqwe nabantu (hhayi nje i-RiaBot), setha ibhendi yeminyaka yakho ku-Settings → Iminyaka & Ingxoxo Engahleliwe.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Setha ibhendi yeminyaka yakho ku-Profile → Iminyaka & Ingxoxo Engahleliwe ukuze ubhanqwe nabantu.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Ukuze ubhanqwe nabantu (hhayi nje i-RiaBot), setha ibhendi yeminyaka yakho ku-Settings → Iminyaka & Ingxoxo Engahleliwe.
randomChat.subtitle: Hlangana nomuntu omusha ngokushesha, noma khetha ukuxoxa no-Ria.
randomChat.setAge: Setha ibhendi yeminyaka yakho ku-Profile → Iminyaka & Ingxoxo Engahleliwe ukuze ubhanqwe nabantu.

ria.intro: Sawubona lapho 👋 Ngingu-Ria. Yini esemqondweni wakho?

greetings.long4: Kuhle ukukubona, {{name}} 👋 Yini esemqondweni wakho namuhla?
greetings.long5: Sawubona {{name}} 😊 Ufuna ukukhuluma, ubuze, noma uxoxe nje?
greetings.short2: Wamukelekile emuva {{name}} 👋 Kukhona yini okunye obufuna ukukwengeza?
greetings.short3: Emuva futhi, {{name}}? 😊 Ngitshele yini esemqondweni wakho.
greetings.short4: Sawubona {{name}} 👋 Ulungele ukuqhubeka lapho besiyeke khona?
greetings.short6: Oh sawubona {{name}}!! Unokuthile okusha emqondweni wakho?

login.title: Qhubeka ku-Chatforia
login.subtitle: Ngena ngemvume kwi-akhawunti yakho ye-Chatforia

forgot.title: Ukhohlwe Iphasiwedi
forgot.helper: Faka i-imeyili owasebenzisa ukudala i-akhawunti yakho ye-Chatforia futhi sizokuthumela isixhumanisi esivikelekile sokusetha kabusha iphasiwedi yakho.
forgot.genericError: Ayikwazanga ukucubungula isicelo. Sicela uzame futhi emva komzuzwana.
forgot.sentHelper: Uma i-akhawunti ikhona ngaleyo imeyili, sithumele isixhumanisi sokusetha kabusha iphasiwedi. Kungase kuthathe imizuzu embalwa ukufika. Qiniseka ukuthi uhlola ifolda ye-spam noma yezikhangiso.

login.ssoUnavailable: Ukungena ngemvume eyodwa akutholakali okwamanje. Sebenzisa igama lomsebenzisi & iphasiwedi esikhundleni.

error.unprocessable: Isicelo esingavumelekile. Hlola igama lomsebenzisi/i-imeyili nephasiwedi yakho.
error.deviceLimit: Umkhawulo wedivayisi ufinyelelwe kuplan yamahhala. Phuma kwenye idivayisi noma thuthukisa ku-Premium ukuze uxhumane namadivayisi engeziwe.

dialer.title: Ocingo
dialer.subtitle: Ikhiphedi & okwakamuva. (Uma ungasebenzisi i-PSTN, qala izingcingo kusuka kunhlokweni yengxoxo.)

video.title: Ividiyo
video.roomsDesc: Ividiyo yamaqembu amaningi isebenzisa igama legumbi elabiwe.
video.roomsIntro: Joyina noma yakha igumbi lamaqembu amaningi.

direct.title: Ividiyo Eqondile
direct.subtitle: Qala ucingo lwevidiyo 1:1 usebenzisa inombolo yocingo noma igama lomsebenzisi le-Chatforia.
direct.tipInvite: Ithiphu: Namathisela inombolo futhi ushayele ngaphandle kokulondoloza oxhumene. Sizomema abasebenzisi abangewona ngesixhumanisi.

rooms.title: Amagumbi
rooms.subtitle: Yakha igumbi noma joyina elikhona ngokuthayipha igama elifanayo.
rooms.desc: Ividiyo yamaqembu amaningi isebenzisa igama legumbi elabiwe.
rooms.tip: Ithiphu: yabelana ngaleli gama nabanye, noma xhumanisa ngokuqondile ku-/video?room=room-name.

phoneWarning.title: Inombolo yakho izophela maduzane
phoneWarning.body: Inombolo yakho {{number}} izokhululwa ngo-{{date}} ngaphandle kokuthi ivuselelwe.

support.heading: Singakusiza kanjani?
support.contactIntro: Sizokuthumela impendulo nge-imeyili. Hlanganisa imininingwane ukuze sisize ukuphindaphinda inkinga.
support.sendError: Ayikwazanga ukuthumela. Thumela i-imeyili ku-support@chatforia.com esikhundleni.

encryptionRecovery.title: Phatha Ukufihla
encryptionRecovery.description: Gcina, buyisela, vula, noma setha kabusha ukhiye wakho wokufihla.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Lesiphequluli ngeke sikwazi ukufihla imiyalezo yakho efihliwe okwamanje. Buyisela, vula, noma setha kabusha ukhiye wakho ukuze uqhubeke.

unlockPasscode.label: Vula iphasikhodi (idivayisi yamanje)
unlockPasscode.description: Isetshenziselwa ukufihla okhiye bakho endaweni ngaphambi kokuthumela

restoreBackupPassword.label: Iphasiwedi yesipele
restoreBackupPassword.description: Iphasiwedi owakhe yona ngesikhathi sokugcina ukhiye wakho ku-iPhone

resetLocalPasscode.label: Iphasiwedi yendawo entsha
resetLocalPasscode.description: Kudingeka ngaphambi kokusetha kabusha ukuze ukhiye omusha uvikelekile kule divayisi

errors.restoreIncomplete: Ukubuyisa ukhiye akuphelele noma akulungile kule akhawunti
errors.noBackup: Akukho sipele esifihliwe esikhona kule akhawunti
errors.noServerPublicKey: Le akhawunti ayikona ukubonisa ukhiye womphakathi weseva
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Isipele seseva asihambisani nokhiye wokufihla we-akhawunti yamanje

confirm.reset:
Setha kabusha ukufihla kule akhawunti?

Imiyalezo emidala efihliwe ingase ingafundeki ngaphandle kokuthi ubuyise ukhiye wokuqala kamuva.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Lokhu kwakha ukhiye wokufihla omusha we-akhawunti yakho. Imiyalezo emidala efihliwe ingase ingafundeki ngaphandle kokuthi ubuyise ukhiye wokuqala kamuva.

press.title: Ukushicilela
press.boilerplateBody: I-Chatforia iyinhlelo lokusebenza lokuthumela imiyalezo elibeka ubumfihlo kuqala elenza ukuxoxa ngezilimi ezihlukene kube lula. Imiyalezo ifihlwe ukuphela ukuphela ngokuzenzakalelayo, futhi ukuhumusha okwakhelwe ngaphakathi kusekela izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100 ngesikhathi sangempela. Abasebenzisi bangakwazi ukunika amandla imiyalezo enyamalala, ukugcina ukuthola ukufundwa ngokuzikhethela, nokuvumelanisa kuwo wonke amadivayisi. Itholakala ku-iOS, Android, kanye newebhu.
press.scanTip: Kudeskithophu? Skena ngefoni yakho ukuze uthole uhlelo lokusebenza.

careers.title: Imisebenzi
careers.intro: Siyithimba elincane labasunguli elakha i-Chatforia — isithunywa somhlaba esiyimfihlo esethulwa kuwebhu, iOS, ne-Android. Uma ukhathalela ubumfihlo, ukufihla, nokuhlangenwe nakho komsebenzisi okujabulisayo, singathanda ukuzwa ngawe.
careers.openRoles: Imisebenzi yokusungula evulekile: Umphathi Wobunjiniyela Obuphelele, Unjiniyela Wemuva (Node.js), Unjiniyela Waphambili/Webhu (React), Unjiniyela Wemobile (iOS), Unjiniyela Wemobile (Android), DevOps/SRE, Unjiniyela Wokuphepha & Ukufihla, Unjiniyela Wezokuxhumana (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Indlela yokufaka isicelo: Sebenzisa inkinobho engezansi ukuze uthumele i-CV yakho nezixhumanisi nge-imeyili.
careers.whyBullets:
• Siza ukwakha isisekelo sesithunywa esisha somhlaba.
• Thumela ukuthuthukiswa okusetshenziswa kuwebhu, iOS, ne-Android.
• Sebenza ngqo nomsunguli ngokwakha nokubhekisisa umkhiqizo.
• Nakekela izindawo ezinomthelela omkhulu wesitaki: ukuthumela imiyalezo, ukushaya ucingo, ividiyo, ukufihla, ukuxhumana, i-AI.
• Joyina ekuqaleni — ngaphambi kokuthi isisebenzi sikhule.

about.title: Mayelana ne-Chatforia
about.description: I-Chatforia iyisithunywa esivikelekile, esinezilimi eziningi esinokufihla ukuphela ukuphela, ukuhumusha okusheshayo, nokushaya ucingo/ividiyo. Inhloso yethu ilula: siza abantu ukuxhumana—ngokuphepha, ngokuyimfihlo, nangaphesheya kwezilimi.

values.privacy: Okubekwa kuqala ubumfihlo: Ukufihla ukuphela ukuphela ngokuzenzakalelayo.
values.access: Ukufinyelela kwawo wonke umuntu: Humusha ngokuzenzakalelayo izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100.
values.privacy_aria: Okubekwa kuqala ubumfihlo: Ukufihla ukuphela ukuphela ngokuzenzakalelayo.
values.access_aria: Ukufinyelela kwawo wonke umuntu: Humusha ngokuzenzakalelayo izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100.
values.control_aria: Ukudlulisa: Imiyalezo enyamalala nokwamukela ukufundwa kuyinketho.

about.howDescription: Imiyalezo ifihlwa edivayisini yakho ngaphambi kokuthi ishiye. Ukuhumusha, izipele, nokuvumelanisa kwedivayisi kuhlelelwe ukunciphisa lokho amaseva ethu angakubona.

advertise.title: Khangisa ne-Chatforia
advertise.description: Finyelela abasebenzisi abaxoxayo abazimisele ngokubekwa okunambithekayo, okuphephile kumkhiqizo. Sinikeza ukubonakala kwebhena ezindaweni ezibonakalayo kakhulu, ukuxhasa, namaphromoshini endlu. Ababhalisile be-premium ababoni izikhangiso.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Siphinde sinikeze ukubonakala nge-Google AdSense. Ungaqondisa i-Chatforia nge-ID yomshicileli {{pubId}}, noma usebenzise ifomu engezansi ukuxhasa ngokuqondile.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Siphinde sinikeze okunye ukubonakala nge-Google AdSense. Ukuxhasa ngokuqondile kuyatholakala—sebenzisa ifomu engezansi.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Sisalungisa ukubonakala kwezikhangiso zethu. Sitshele ngomkhankaso wakho futhi sizokuncoma ukubekwa.

why.highSession: Ukuphakama kwezikhathi zesikhathi nokuhlala esikhathini eside ku-UI yengxoxo
why.brandSafe: Izinhlobo eziphephile kumkhiqizo; ukuphela kwezikhathi ezihloniphekile
why.deals: Izivumelwano eziqondile noma izinhlelo nge-AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Siyabonga! Umbuzo wakho usendleleni. Sizoxhumana maduzane.
form.mailtoInfo: Ivula iklayenti le-imeyili lakho ukuthumela umbuzo…
